checks.title: Strict account readiness passes
checks.remediation: Fix invalid/missing required account keys before production deployment.

checks.title: Node runtime >= 20
checks.remediation: Install Node 20+ and retry readiness checks.

checks.title: npm command available
checks.remediation: Install npm and ensure it is available in PATH.

checks.title: Workstream branch bootstrap script exists
checks.remediation: Add branch/workstream automation for consistent parallel delivery.

checks.title: System gap analysis passes
checks.remediation: Resolve architectural/process gaps reported by quality baseline.

checks.title: Vercel account sync script exists
checks.remediation: Add deterministic env sync script for deployment keys.

checks.title: Vercel project registry + topology script exist
checks.remediation: Add a project registry and topology checker for multi-project Vercel operations.

checks.title: GitHub quality/release workflows exist
checks.remediation: Add PR + nightly + release workflows for production safety.

checks.title: Vercel topology strict gate passes
checks.remediation: Link active runtime project and resolve Vercel topology blockers.

checks.title: Git remote configured
checks.remediation: Configure origin remote to enable push/PR workflow.

checks.title: Branch + infra runbook exists
checks.remediation: Add a single operational runbook for branch model and infra promotion.
